expectations.text: Re-forms the content into platform-native formats rather than reposting identical text everywhere
expectations.evidence: Re-forms per platform rather than reposting identical text.

expectations.text: Names a distinct native format per platform (e.g. X thread, LinkedIn carousel/post, Instagram Reel or carousel)
expectations.evidence: Distinct native formats: X thread, LinkedIn carousel/post, Instagram Reel/carousel.

expectations.text: Gives hook guidance for at least one platform (the first line/first second)
expectations.evidence: Hook guidance for the first line/first second.

expectations.text: Reflects platform differences (e.g. X is punchy/threaded, Instagram is visual-first, LinkedIn is professional-narrative)
expectations.evidence: Reflects platform differences (X punchy, IG visual-first, LinkedIn narrative).

expectations.text: Does not just say 'share the link on each platform'
expectations.evidence: Does not just say 'share the link everywhere'.
